Marketing.heroTitle: Your path to a new future
Marketing.heroSubtitle: Prepare step by step for Speaking, Listening, Reading, Writing and Knowledge of Dutch Society — with our own practice material, instant AI feedback and a personal study plan.
Marketing.trustNoCopiedExams: Our own practice material, no copied exam questions
Marketing.trustAiFeedback: Instant AI feedback on every exercise
Marketing.trustStudyPlan: Personal study plan, adapted to your pace
Marketing.levelsSubtitle: From your first Dutch words to the NT2 State Exam Programme II.
Marketing.skillSprekenDesc: Practice everyday conversations and get instant feedback.
Marketing.skillLuisterenDesc: Listen to realistic audio fragments and answer interactive questions.
Marketing.skillLezenDesc: Read emails, letters and ads — difficult words are explained right away.
Marketing.skillSchrijvenDesc: Write emails and forms and get feedback on grammar and structure.
Marketing.skillKnmDesc: Learn how the Netherlands works: housing, work, healthcare, DigiD and more.
Marketing.ctaSectionTitle: One step closer to your goal, every day
Marketing.ctaSectionBody: After registering, you'll set up your study plan: native language, target level, exam date and time available per day. We automatically adjust your plan as you progress.
Marketing.disclaimer: Our own practice material — no copied exam questions, no guarantee of passing.
Marketing.footerTagline: Your path to a new future.

Auth.loginSubtitle: Log in to continue with your study plan.
Auth.registerSubtitle: Start your personal learning plan for civic integration or the NT2 state exam.

Dashboard.noContentForLevel: Content for {level} is still in development. You can adjust your goal later once this level becomes available.
Dashboard.noStudyPlanYet: We'll put together your study plan as soon as content is available.
Dashboard.accessBannerText: You're currently using the free preview (1 lesson per skill). Activate your account for full access.
Dashboard.examVideoTitle: What is the civic integration exam?
Dashboard.examVideoSubtitle: A short explanation of what to expect.

LockedLevel.chooseLevelFirst: Choose your level in your study plan first to see exercises.

Upgrade.coachMessage: The AI exam coach is part of full access.

Skills.knmSubtitle: Learn about the Netherlands: history, housing, work and Dutch society.

Spreken.disclaimer: We evaluate the text recognized by speech recognition, not your pronunciation itself.

Spreken.unsupported: Speech recognition isn't supported in this browser. Type below what you would say.

Proefexamen.title: Mock exam
Proefexamen.sectionsFor: This mock exam includes sections for: {skills}.
Proefexamen.missingAnswer: This question is missing an answer.

Toegang.title: Activate access
Toegang.body: You've already tried a free lesson per skill. For full access to all lessons, mock exams and the AI exam coach, payments at InNederland.ai are handled manually via WhatsApp — no credit card or automatic payments needed.
Toegang.activationNote: Once your payment is processed, we'll activate your account manually — usually within a few hours.

Geblokkeerd.title: Your account is blocked
Geblokkeerd.body: Contact us via WhatsApp if you think this is a mistake, or if you have questions about your account.
